syntax_11812.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11812.title: Region - Expand/Contract
syntax_11812.description:
Makes a region larger or smaller in a given direction by a given amount. Optionally takes an opposite amount to expand the region in the other direction.
Regions can also be expanded vertically, which makes them span from the min to the max of the world they're in.

en:
Makes a region larger or smaller in a given direction by a given amount. Optionally takes an opposite amount to expand the region in the other direction.
Regions can also be expanded vertically, which makes them span from the min to the max of the world they're in.

syntax_11813.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11813.title: Region - Inset/Outset
syntax_11813.description: Insets or outsets a region by a given number of blocks. Can optionally only perform the operation vertically (up and down) or horizontally (north, south, east, and west).

en: Insets or outsets a region by a given number of blocks. Can optionally only perform the operation vertically (up and down) or horizontally (north, south, east, and west).

syntax_11814.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11814.title: Region - Block Count
syntax_11814.description: Gets the number of a certain type of block in a region. Can use a mask to specify more than one kind of block.
syntax_11814.syntax_pattern:
[the] (count|number) of blocks in %worldeditregions% that match [mask] %string/itemtype/worldeditmask%
[the] (count|number) of %string/itemtype/worldeditmask% [blocks] in %worldeditregions%

en: Gets the number of a certain type of block in a region. Can use a mask to specify more than one kind of block.

syntax_11826.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11826.title: Schematic - Paste
syntax_11826.description:
Pastes a schematic, with a bunch of configurable options (see below for a list of them).
Note that the name of the schematic shouldn't include any path, as skript-worldedit will always start at WorldEdit's schematics directory.

Entries:
* paste entities: whether the schematic should copy entities
* paste biomes: whether the schematic should copy biomes
* ignore air: whether the schematic should paste air blocks
* rotation: the number of degrees that the pasted schematic should be rotated by (around the y-axis)
* mask: a mask which will only let matching blocks be pasted

en:
Pastes a schematic, with a bunch of configurable options (see below for a list of them).
Note that the name of the schematic shouldn't include any path, as skript-worldedit will always start at WorldEdit's schematics directory.

Entries:
* paste entities: whether the schematic should copy entities
* paste biomes: whether the schematic should copy biomes
* ignore air: whether the schematic should paste air blocks
* rotation: the number of degrees that the pasted schematic should be rotated by (around the y-axis)
* mask: a mask which will only let matching blocks be pasted

syntax_11827.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11827.title: Schematic - Save
syntax_11827.description:
Saves a region as a schematic, with a bunch of configurable options (see below for a list of them).
Note that the name of the schematic shouldn't include any path, as skript-worldedit will always start at WorldEdit's schematics directory.

Entries:
* copy entities: whether the schematic should copy entities
* copy biomes: whether the schematic should copy biomes
* remove entities: whether the schematic should remove entities
* overwrite: whether the schematic should overwrite any schematics of the same name (if false, the schematic won't save if a schematic is found with the same name)
* origin: where the origin of the saved schematic should be
* mask: a mask which will only let matching blocks be copied

en:
Saves a region as a schematic, with a bunch of configurable options (see below for a list of them).
Note that the name of the schematic shouldn't include any path, as skript-worldedit will always start at WorldEdit's schematics directory.

Entries:
* copy entities: whether the schematic should copy entities
* copy biomes: whether the schematic should copy biomes
* remove entities: whether the schematic should remove entities
* overwrite: whether the schematic should overwrite any schematics of the same name (if false, the schematic won't save if a schematic is found with the same name)
* origin: where the origin of the saved schematic should be
* mask: a mask which will only let matching blocks be copied

syntax_11961.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11961.title: Region - Forest
syntax_11961.description:
Generates a forest of a specific tree type in a given region, with a given density. The default density is 5.
Note that this effect uses a new tree type, not the Skript one.

en:
Generates a forest of a specific tree type in a given region, with a given density. The default density is 5.
Note that this effect uses a new tree type, not the Skript one.

syntax_11962.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11962.title: Schematic - Delete
syntax_11962.description: Deletes a schematic. Nothing too fancy.

en: Deletes a schematic. Nothing too fancy.

syntax_11824.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11824.title: Schematic - Paste
syntax_11824.description:
Pastes a schematic at a location(s). Can be rotated, and can choose whether it should ignore air or not.
There is also a section for pasting schematics, which features more options.
syntax_11824.syntax_pattern: paste [schem[atic] [named|with name]] %string% at %locations% [(with rotation|rotated by) %number% [degrees]] [[and] while ignoring air]

en:
Pastes a schematic at a location(s). Can be rotated, and can choose whether it should ignore air or not.
There is also a section for pasting schematics, which features more options.

syntax_11764.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11764.title: Region - Place Centre
syntax_11764.description: Places a block in the centre of a given region using a given pattern.

en: Places a block in the centre of a given region using a given pattern.

syntax_11758.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11758.title: Region - Create Walls
syntax_11758.description: Creates the walls of a given region using a given pattern.

en: Creates the walls of a given region using a given pattern.

syntax_11759.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11759.title: Region - Flora
syntax_11759.description: Generates flora in a given region, with a given density. The default density is 5.

en: Generates flora in a given region, with a given density. The default density is 5.

syntax_11760.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11760.title: Region - Hollow Out
syntax_11760.description:
Hollows out objects in a given region, using a given thickness and leaving behind a given pattern.
The default thickness is 1, and the default pattern is just air.

en:
Hollows out objects in a given region, using a given thickness and leaving behind a given pattern.
The default thickness is 1, and the default pattern is just air.

syntax_11772.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11772.title: Mask
syntax_11772.description: Gets a WorldEdit mask from a string or itemtype.

en: Gets a WorldEdit mask from a string or itemtype.

syntax_11773.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11773.title: Pattern
syntax_11773.description: Gets a WorldEdit pattern from a string or itemtype.

en: Gets a WorldEdit pattern from a string or itemtype.

syntax_11774.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11774.title: Region - Centre
syntax_11774.description: Gets the centre of a given region.

en: Gets the centre of a given region.

syntax_11775.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11775.title: Region - Convex Polyhedral
syntax_11775.description: Creates a convex polyhedral region, which can be used for operations.

en: Creates a convex polyhedral region, which can be used for operations.

syntax_11776.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11776.title: Region - Cuboid
syntax_11776.description: Creates a cuboid region, which can be used for operations.

en: Creates a cuboid region, which can be used for operations.

syntax_11777.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11777.title: Region - Cylinder
syntax_11777.description: Creates a cylindrical region, which can be used for operations.
syntax_11777.syntax_pattern: [a] [new] cyl[ind(er|rical)] region at %location% with radi(i|us) %numbers% [and] with height %number%

en: Creates a cylindrical region, which can be used for operations.

syntax_11778.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11778.title: Region - Ellipsoid
syntax_11778.description: Creates an ellipsoid region, which can be used for operations.

en: Creates an ellipsoid region, which can be used for operations.

syntax_11779.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11779.title: Region - Faces
syntax_11779.description:
Gets the faces of a given region. This expression only works on cuboid regions.
This returns another region, which can be used in other operations.

en:
Gets the faces of a given region. This expression only works on cuboid regions.
This returns another region, which can be used in other operations.

syntax_11780.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11780.title: Region - Vertices
syntax_11780.description: Gets the vertices of a given region. This expression can only be used on convex polyhedral regions.

en: Gets the vertices of a given region. This expression can only be used on convex polyhedral regions.

syntax_11781.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11781.title: Region - Volume
syntax_11781.description: Gets the volume of a given region.

en: Gets the volume of a given region.

syntax_11782.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11782.title: Region - Walls
syntax_11782.description:
Gets the walls of a given region. This expression only works on cuboid regions.
This returns another region, which can be used in other operations.

en:
Gets the walls of a given region. This expression only works on cuboid regions.
This returns another region, which can be used in other operations.

syntax_11783.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11783.title: World Edit Mask
syntax_11783.description: Represents a mask that can be used for WorldEdit operations.

en: Represents a mask that can be used for WorldEdit operations.

syntax_11784.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11784.title: World Edit Pattern
syntax_11784.description: Represents a pattern that can be used for WorldEdit operations.

en: Represents a pattern that can be used for WorldEdit operations.

syntax_11785.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11785.title: World Edit Region
syntax_11785.description: Represents a region that can be used for WorldEdit operations.

en: Represents a region that can be used for WorldEdit operations.

syntax_11786.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11786.title: World Edit Shapes
syntax_11786.description: All the supported creatable shapes using WorldEdit.

en: All the supported creatable shapes using WorldEdit.

syntax_11766.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11766.title: Region - Smooth
syntax_11766.description:
Smooths the area within a given region a certain number of times. The default number of times is 1.
You can choose to only smooth blocks that match a certain mask.

en:
Smooths the area within a given region a certain number of times. The default number of times is 1.
You can choose to only smooth blocks that match a certain mask.

syntax_11768.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11768.title: Set Blocks
syntax_11768.description: Sets the blocks in a region with a given pattern.

en: Sets the blocks in a region with a given pattern.

syntax_11769.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11769.title: Shape - Cylinder
syntax_11769.description:
Creates a cylinder using a given pattern at a certain location.
You can choose for the cylinder to be hollow, and it can take a set of radii and a height.
By default, the radius is 5, the height is 1, and the cylinder will not be hollow.
syntax_11769.syntax_pattern: create [a] [hollow] cylinder ([made] out of|with|using) [pattern] %string/itemtype/worldeditpattern% [with radi(us|i) %numbers%][,| and] [with height %number%] at %locations% [lazily]

en:
Creates a cylinder using a given pattern at a certain location.
You can choose for the cylinder to be hollow, and it can take a set of radii and a height.
By default, the radius is 5, the height is 1, and the cylinder will not be hollow.

syntax_11770.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11770.title: Shape - Pyramid
syntax_11770.description:
Creates a pyramid using a given pattern at a certain location.
You can choose for the pyramid to be hollow, and it can take a size.
By default, the size is 5, and the pyramid will not be hollow.
syntax_11770.syntax_pattern: create [a] [hollow] pyramid ([made] out of|with|using) [pattern] %string/itemtype/worldeditpattern% [with size %number%] at %locations% [lazily]

en:
Creates a pyramid using a given pattern at a certain location.
You can choose for the pyramid to be hollow, and it can take a size.
By default, the size is 5, and the pyramid will not be hollow.

syntax_11771.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11771.title: Shape - Sphere
syntax_11771.description:
Creates a sphere using a given pattern at a certain location.
You can choose for the sphere to be hollow, and it can take a set of radii.
By default, the radius is 5, and the sphere will not be hollow.

en:
Creates a sphere using a given pattern at a certain location.
You can choose for the sphere to be hollow, and it can take a set of radii.
By default, the radius is 5, and the sphere will not be hollow.

syntax_11787.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11787.title: Shape - General
syntax_11787.description:
Creates a shape at a given location. Depending on which shape is being created, a different set of entries can be used.

Entries that can be used with any shape:
* pattern (pattern): the pattern that the shape will be made out of (no default, and this has to be a pattern object (via the pattern expression))
* hollow (boolean): whether the shape will be hollow (default is true)

Entries that can be used with a pyramid:
* size (integer): the size of the pyramid (no default)

Entries that can be used with both a sphere and cylinder:
* radius (number): the radius (on the x-axis) of the shape (no default)
* radiusZ (number): the radius (on the z-axis) of the shape (this is optional, and if not provided, will default to the radius)

Entries that can be used only with a sphere:
* radiusY (number): the radius (on the y-axis) of the shape (this is optional, and if not provided, will default to the radius)

Entries that can be used only with a cylinder:
* height (number): the height of the cylinder (no default)

This section is effectively the same as just using the shape effects, but might be preferable.

en:
Creates a shape at a given location. Depending on which shape is being created, a different set of entries can be used.

Entries that can be used with any shape:
* pattern (pattern): the pattern that the shape will be made out of (no default, and this has to be a pattern object (via the pattern expression))
* hollow (boolean): whether the shape will be hollow (default is true)

Entries that can be used with a pyramid:
* size (integer): the size of the pyramid (no default)

Entries that can be used with both a sphere and cylinder:
* radius (number): the radius (on the x-axis) of the shape (no default)
* radiusZ (number): the radius (on the z-axis) of the shape (this is optional, and if not provided, will default to the radius)

Entries that can be used only with a sphere:
* radiusY (number): the radius (on the y-axis) of the shape (this is optional, and if not provided, will default to the radius)

Entries that can be used only with a cylinder:
* height (number): the height of the cylinder (no default)

This section is effectively the same as just using the shape effects, but might be preferable.

syntax_11808.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11808.title: Region - Biome
syntax_11808.description: Sets the biome of given region.

en: Sets the biome of given region.

syntax_11757.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11757.title: Region - Create Faces
syntax_11757.description: Creates the faces (walls + ceiling + floor) of a given region using a given pattern.

en: Creates the faces (walls + ceiling + floor) of a given region using a given pattern.

syntax_11761.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11761.title: Region - Move
syntax_11761.description:
Moves the blocks in a given region in a given direction a given distance.
You can choose to only move the blocks that match a given mask too, as well as filling the left-behind area using a certain pattern.
Additionally, air can be ignored, and entities and biomes can be copied.

By default, the distance will be 1, all blocks will be moved, no pattern will be left behind, air will not be ignored, and entities and biomes will not be copied.
syntax_11761.syntax_pattern: move [(blocks that match|all) %string/itemtype/worldeditmask% in] %worldeditregions% (up|down|north|south|east|west) [%number% (time|block)[s]] [and (fill the area with|leave behind) [pattern] %string/itemtype/worldeditpattern%] [while ignoring air[,]] [while copying entities[,| and]] [while copying biomes] [lazily]

en:
Moves the blocks in a given region in a given direction a given distance.
You can choose to only move the blocks that match a given mask too, as well as filling the left-behind area using a certain pattern.
Additionally, air can be ignored, and entities and biomes can be copied.

By default, the distance will be 1, all blocks will be moved, no pattern will be left behind, air will not be ignored, and entities and biomes will not be copied.

syntax_11762.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11762.title: Region - Naturalize
syntax_11762.description: Naturalizes a given region. This just changes the top 3 layers of blocks into grass/dirt, and the bottom layers into stone.

en: Naturalizes a given region. This just changes the top 3 layers of blocks into grass/dirt, and the bottom layers into stone.

syntax_11763.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11763.title: Region - Overlay
syntax_11763.description: Overlays the top level of blocks in a given region using a given pattern.

en: Overlays the top level of blocks in a given region using a given pattern.

syntax_11765.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11765.title: Region - Regenerate
syntax_11765.description:
Regenerates the area within a given region while optionally regenerating biomes, using a given seed.
The default seed is just the seed of the region's world, and biomes will not be regenerated by default.

en:
Regenerates the area within a given region while optionally regenerating biomes, using a given seed.
The default seed is just the seed of the region's world, and biomes will not be regenerated by default.

syntax_11767.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11767.title: Replace Blocks
syntax_11767.description: Replaces blocks in a region that match a certain mask with a given pattern.
syntax_11767.syntax_pattern:
(use ([fastasync]world[ ]edit|[fa]we) to|[fastasync]world[ ]edit|[fa]we) replace [all] blocks in %worldeditregion% that match [mask] %string/itemtype/worldeditmask% with [pattern] %string/itemtype/worldeditpattern% [lazily]
(use ([fastasync]world[ ]edit|[fa]we) to|[fastasync]world[ ]edit|[fa]we) replace all %string/itemtype/worldeditmask% in %worldeditregion% with %string/itemtype/worldeditpattern% [lazily]

en: Replaces blocks in a region that match a certain mask with a given pattern.

syntax_11809.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11809.title: Region - Dimensions
syntax_11809.description: Gets the dimensions of a given region.

en: Gets the dimensions of a given region.

syntax_11807.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11807.title: Create Spline
syntax_11807.description:
Create a spline using a set of locations. The order of the locations in this effect matter.
A rigid spline will create straight lines from location to location, whereas a non-rigid spline will createa curved line which goes through all the locations.

en:
Create a spline using a set of locations. The order of the locations in this effect matter.
A rigid spline will create straight lines from location to location, whereas a non-rigid spline will createa curved line which goes through all the locations.

syntax_13985.creator: cheezburga
syntax_13985.title: Schematic - Exists
syntax_13985.description: Checks whether a schematic with a given name exists.
syntax_13985.syntax_pattern:
schem[atic] %string% exists
schem[atic] %string% does(n't| not) exist

en: Checks whether a schematic with a given name exists.

syntax_11825.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11825.title: Schematic - Save
syntax_11825.description:
Saves a region as a schematic.
The name of the schematic shouldn't include any path, as skript-worldedit will always start at WorldEdit's schematics directory.
The centre of the schematic can be set, as well as whether or not it should overwrite an existing schematic of the same name.

en:
Saves a region as a schematic.
The name of the schematic shouldn't include any path, as skript-worldedit will always start at WorldEdit's schematics directory.
The centre of the schematic can be set, as well as whether or not it should overwrite an existing schematic of the same name.

syntax_11963.creator: cheezburga
syntax_11963.title: Tree Types
syntax_11963.description: All the supported tree types that WorldEdit can use.
syntax_11963.type_usage: acacia, azalea, big_tree, birch, brown_mushroom, cherry, chorus_plant, crimson_fungus, dark_oak, jungle, jungle_bush, mangrove, mega_redwood, pale_oak, pale_oak_creaking, pine, random, random_birch, random_jungle, random_mushroom, random_redwood, red_mushroom, redwood, short_jungle, small_jungle, swamp, tall_birch, tall_mangrove, tall_redwood, tree, warped_fungus

en: All the supported tree types that WorldEdit can use.
